prevalence.source: European gynecology and STI epidemiology syntheses
prevalence.trend: stable; recurrent disease linked to diabetes and antibiotic use

burden.dalyPerCapita: low mortality; discomfort and recurrence burden

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical symptoms with microscopy and pH testing; culture for recurrent or nonresponsive cases

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High for acute episodes; recurrent cases need longer regimens

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care/gynecology with lab confirmation widely available
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Topical azoles or oral fluconazole; maintenance therapy for recurrent disease
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Antifungal resistance in recurrent cases and misdiagnosis with BV
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong access to diagnostics and antifungals
